[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010110 3
1 1100111 5
2 0110000 2
3 0010001 2
4 0010110 3
5 1101110 5
6 0001011 3
7 1001001 3

71 17 0001000 1

50 05 0000010 1

04 40 1100111 5 match 1
15 51 0110000 2 match 2
26 62 0010001 2 match 3
37 73 0010110 3 match 0 4
